overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a walk through Night City during golden hour. The player navigates a commercial street lined with palm trees, neon signs, and futuristic skyscrapers while pedestrians and vehicles move through the scene.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial street corner with neon storefront

events.description: ego crosses the asphalt street from right sidewalk to left sidewalk

agents.ego_description: walking forward and crossing the street, moving from the green building side to the palm tree lined side

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in white jacket and camouflage pants talking on phone, then walking away from camera

entered.detail: green and red commercial building with BUBBLE TROUBLE neon signage
tall glass and steel skyscrapers with illuminated windows dominating the skyline
tall palm trees lining the opposite side of the street
multi-lane city street with red curbs and crosswalk markings

segments.scene_description: The segment begins on a commercial sidewalk next to a green building with bright neon signage. The camera moves forward and crosses the asphalt street, passing a pedestrian on a phone. Futuristic mega-towers rise in the background against a clear golden-hour sky.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk, passing pedestrians and approaching the EMBER club area

notable_agents.action: pedestrian with bright pink cap and yellow shirt walking while talking on phone

entered.detail: dark commercial building with red EMBER signage and neon accents
tall poles with solar panels and lighting fixtures

segments.scene_description: Walking along a palm-lined commercial boulevard during golden hour, the EMBER nightclub becomes visible on the left. The sidewalk is populated with pedestrians moving in various directions, and long shadows stretch across the concrete from the setting sun.

events.description: ego briefly turns head to observe passing pedestrian with distinctive appearance

agents.ego_description: continuing down the street, passing by seated NPCs and arcade machines while observing surroundings

notable_agents.action: shirtless pedestrian with yellow jacket walking toward camera

entered.detail: commercial facades with bright purple and blue neon signage and advertisements
futuristic automated vending machines with glowing displays

segments.scene_description: The walk continues past the EMBER club through an entertainment district lined with neon storefronts and vending machines. The sun creates a strong backlight effect, casting long shadows of palm trees across the sidewalk as various pedestrians pass by.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow commercial sidewalk with closed storefronts

agents.ego_description: walking along a narrower sidewalk section, passing closed shops and approaching an alleyway entrance

entered.detail: industrial blue building with corrugated metal walls and red X markings on garage doors
narrow passage between buildings leading to back areas
massive overhead advertising screen displaying animated content

segments.scene_description: The sidewalk narrows as the camera passes closed storefronts and approaches a blue industrial warehouse building. An alleyway entrance appears on the right while a large digital billboard becomes visible overhead against the backdrop of futuristic towers.

events.description: ego looks upward to view large overhead billboards and skyscrapers

agents.ego_description: walking while looking up at the large overhead billboards and architectural details of the surrounding buildings

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in dark clothing walking away from camera down the sidewalk

entered.detail: large metal framework supporting massive digital advertisements spanning the street
industrial fans and exhaust systems on building exterior

segments.scene_description: The final segment focuses on the blue industrial building and massive overhead billboards that span the street. The camera pans upward to take in the scale of the advertising structures and surrounding mega-towers before continuing down the sun-drenched sidewalk.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey along a bustling commercial boulevard that transitions from a street crossing into a vibrant, neon-lit entertainment district during golden hour. It begins on a sidewalk beside a green building with bright neon signage, moving forward to cross an asphalt street past a pedestrian while futuristic mega-towers loom against the clear sky. As the camera continues along the palm-lined boulevard, the EMBER nightclub emerges on the left and long shadows from the setting sun begin to stretch across the concrete. The scene then shifts deeper into the entertainment district, passing the club and moving amidst a dense array of neon storefronts and vending machines. Finally, the walk progresses through the crowd as the strong backlight of the sun casts elongated palm tree shadows across the sidewalk.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a narrowing urban sidewalk that transitions from a street of storefronts into the shadow of towering industrial architecture. It begins by passing closed shops as the path tightens, leading the camera toward a blue industrial warehouse and a dark alleyway entrance on the right. As the camera advances, a massive digital billboard emerges overhead, framing the view against a backdrop of distant futuristic towers. The scene then shifts focus upward, panning to capture the immense scale of the advertising structures and surrounding mega-towers before finally returning to the sun-drenched sidewalk.
